source.section: Part 12 - Datalink & IFF > IFF from RDR ATTK Page

steps.action: Power Up IFF (Identify-Friend-or-Foe) system by pressing the IFF Button, then holding the ON button on the UFC for a few seconds. When « XP » is displayed, the IFF has been powered up correctly. Verify that Mode 4 is selected (« : » should be visible next to « 4 »). If it is not, press on the OSB (Option Select Button) next to it.
steps.voiced: Press the IFF Button, hold ON until XP displays, then confirm Mode 4 is selected — colon visible next to 4.

steps.action: Power Up Link-16 Datalink system by pressing the D/L Button a first time to display the Link-4 datalink options, then press the D/L Button a second time to display the Link-16 datalink options. Then, hold the ON button on the UFC for a few seconds. When « ON » is displayed, the Link-16 Datalink system has been powered up correctly.
steps.voiced: Press D/L twice to cycle to Link-16, then hold ON until ON displays.

steps.action: On UFC, set desired Datalink Frequency by entering it on the scratchpad, then pressing « ENT ». 127 is used by default, you can keep it.
steps.voiced: Enter the datalink frequency on the UFC scratchpad and press ENT — 127 is standard.
